emails.subject: GFI Non disclosure
emails.body: GFI Non disclosure I am working with Andy Zipper on the Broker Client application. I talked to Colin Hefron at GFI and his attorney is apparently working with you on the Non Disclosure Agreement. Please let me know the status so that I can move forward on discussions with GFI. My number is 713 853-0397.
